description:
Build the patient payment collection path so Stripe cannot charge before the approved MDI clinical event.

**Scope**
- Implement the selected Stripe flow, likely SetupIntent/payment-method capture or Checkout configured to defer charging until the unlock event is known.
- Store only `stripe_customer_id`, payment readiness/status, and opaque IDs in DynamoDB/Stripe metadata.
- Handle users who are clinically declined or abandoned without creating charges or active subscriptions.
- Keep exact event semantics aligned with T-078.

**Acceptance**
- In tests, no charge or subscription can be created before the selected MDI approval/unlock event.
- Clinically declined flow leaves no active billing and presents a clear support/refund path if applicable.
- Stripe metadata contains only allowed opaque identifiers.
title: Payment-method or checkout flow gated by clinical approval
